edge-appliance-auth-bypass-rce.rationale: Vendor-appliance management plane (MDM, SD-WAN, EMS, BIG-IP, etc.), unauthenticated or near-default auth, network-edge HTTP/HTTPS surface, primitive-direct RCE via input handling. Tier A.

definitions.FRIENDLY: Signature-able payload, generic OWASP rules cover, emergency rule ships within hours
definitions.MEDIUM: Signature exists but evadable (encoding, obfuscation, format gaps)
definitions.HOSTILE: Wrong protocol entirely or attack indistinguishable from legitimate traffic

CVE-2013-7285.rationale: Class-name signature evadable, gadget zoo wide

CVE-2020-1938.rationale: AJP is binary on port 8009 — WAF doesn't see it

CVE-2021-44228.rationale: ${jndi:} patterns shipped same-day; Unicode obfuscation extended window

CVE-2022-1471.rationale: YAML body parsing varies by WAF; !!javax.script tag detectable

CVE-2025-24813.rationale: Two-step PUT-then-GET chain distributed across requests

CVE-2026-34197.rationale: JSON-to-MBean patterns visible; Jolokia often deployment-internal
